projectContextWorkflowBetaFallback: Workflow is shown as beta. If unavailable, use Generate Context then complete with product context.
selectDocOrLaunchAgent: Select a document or launch an agent
freshnessStale_one: ⚠ Generated {{count}} day ago — may be out of date
freshnessStale_other: ⚠ Generated {{count}} days ago — may be out of date
contextNotGenerated: No context generated yet. Run Generate Context to let agents understand this workspace without rescanning on each session.
prdSubtitle: This wizard prepares a prompt for /nak-agent-brainstorming.
prdPromptIntro: Help me build an initial PRD with this context:
prdPromptOutro: At session end, save the synthesis in ~/.nakiros/workspaces/{workspace_slug}/context/brainstorming.md.
contextConflict: Sync conflict — {{repo}} was updated by {{updatedBy}}. Overwrite remote or dismiss?
remoteDocBadgeTooltip: Pulled from Nakiros Cloud (repo not cloned locally)
docEditorChatPlaceholder: Ask the AI to edit this document…
docEditorModeReviewDescription: The agent proposes a version. Nothing is written until you approve it.
docEditorModeYoloDescription: The agent may apply immediately, but the review step still stays mandatory afterward.
docEditorComposeDescription: Describe the intended result. The agent will produce a full artifact proposal, not a partial patch.
docEditorAssistTitle: AI review loop ready for this document
docEditorAssistBody: Open the AI editor to request a structured rewrite, inspect the diff, and validate before or after apply depending on the selected mode.
productTreeEmpty: No markdown files found in context/
productSelectionEmptyBody: Browse the context tree to open a workspace file.
productEmptyDocBody: This document does not exist yet in the workspace context.
artifactReviewSubtitle: Review the proposed artifact change before closing the loop.
artifactReviewModeDiffDescription: This change has not been applied yet. Accept it to write the artifact.
artifactReviewModeYoloDescription: This change is already applied. Rejecting it will restore the previous state.
artifactReviewPendingAlertBody: Compare the proposed version with the baseline, then accept or reject it.
artifactReviewAppliedAlertBody: The visible content already reflects the new version. Rejecting it will roll back the application.
productFeatureNoSpecBody: Use the PM agent to create the feature spec.
productFeatureNoUXBody: Use the UX designer agent to create screens and flows.
productFeatureNoStoriesBody: Use the PM agent to generate stories from this feature spec.
